title: Crypto Market Recap — June 12, 2026
summary: Bitcoin is trading at $63,782, up 0.3% over the last 24 hours. Ethereum is trading at $1,674, up 0.1% over the last 24 hours. Solana is trading at $66.87, up 0.0% over the last 24 hours. Looking ahead, traders are watching FOMC Meeting (Day 1 of 2) on June 16 and FOMC Rate Decision + Powell Press Conference on June 17 and US CPI Release (June data) on July 14. As always, manage risk: size positions from your stop loss, not from conviction.
